purpose: Validate the native MORI balanced-MoE needed-row exchange runtime-plan cleanup before the next clean-node sustained throughput A/B.
change_summary: MORI BalancedMoeOwnerCompactExchangePlan.as_tensors now carries host split tuples and needed_row_count alongside device metadata tensors.
MORI exchange_owner_compact_needed_rows can consume precomputed send_local_indices and grad_recv_local_indices.
MORI now exports prepare_owner_compact_needed_rows_runtime_plan from mori.ops so framework callers can prepare reusable runtime metadata through the native balanced_moe API.
MORI now exports build_owner_compact_exchange_runtime_plan from mori.ops so framework callers can build the serial debug plan and reusable runtime tensor plan in one native API call.
MORI now exports build_owner_compact_exchange_runtime_plan_from_plan from mori.ops so callers with an existing BalancedMoePlan can keep runtime local-index translation inside MORI.
MORI now exports build_balanced_moe_runtime_layout from mori.ops so callers can build the source hot/cold partition and owner-compact exchange runtime plan as one native layout ABI.
MORI exchange_owner_compact_needed_rows can consume a fully prepared runtime plan without requiring compact_local_indices from the framework caller.
TorchTitan standard-EP hot-helper needed-layout path precomputes those local-index tensors once per helper forward and reuses them across hot-weight banks.

coverage: autograd backward scatter to local owner rows
legacy plan without precomputed local indices
autograd backward scatter to local owner rows
autograd backward scatter to local owner rows
autograd backward scatter to local owner rows

added_coverage: build_balanced_moe_runtime_layout groups owner-compact presorted source partition metadata with reusable exchange runtime metadata
build_owner_compact_exchange_runtime_plan builds serial and runtime plans in MORI
build_owner_compact_exchange_runtime_plan_from_plan builds serial and runtime plans from an existing BalancedMoePlan
runtime-plan send_local_indices and grad_recv_local_indices are precomputed from compact local expert indices
runtime-plan exchange matches fallback exchange on the same compact offset ABI without passing compact_local_indices to the exchange call
autograd backward returns helper partial gradients to local owner rows through the cached runtime-plan path
exchange_owner_compact_needed_rows rejects calls without compact_local_indices when the plan lacks precomputed local indices

node_state_after_smoke.do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu: not clean for 8x gate; unrelated 4-rank Primus/TorchTitan Qwen3 job holds GPUs 0-3
node_state_after_smoke.do-sonle5-mi350-gpu: briefly idle, then an unrelated Primus/Qwen3 rejoin job acquired GPUs 0-3 before the 8x needed-layout gate could start
node_state_after_smoke.action: launcher refused before metrics; no contaminated throughput result kept

next_gate.shape: 8xMI350, flash_12layer_ceiling_probe, S4096, GBS128, FSDP8/EP8, attention-only activation checkpointing, CE8
compare: needed layout + mori runtime tensor plan
promotion_requires: low-intrusion timing profile if throughput moves
